title: Immersive Vanilla
description: 1.21.11 | A client-side selection of Vanilla+ mods/packs to make your play-through much more animated and immersive, without straying from the vanilla Minecraft feel!
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1c164c538fe6c1578e2d3c07e4e166540eb6424.png)

All the **Client Side** immersion/performance mods and animation resource packs I use on a daily basis. If you like the vanilla feel of the game, but feels it needs a little more "spice" - this pack is for you.

## Features:

This pack includes all the essential performance mods to make the game run better, and a ton of super fun animation, particle and other immersion mods. Plus a bunch of quality of life mods as well! I'm sure you will have seen most of these before, but this is the compilation I like to use personally. 

I also included all my favorite resource packs that add new models and animations. I like to pair this with my favorite Vanilla Tweaks setup, link for this is below!

I have been playing Minecraft for most of my life, and I have been modifying the game for most of that time. It's about time I compile a pack of my favorite mods I've come across over the years! These mods and resource packs are **client-side only**, so they will work on servers flawlessly! I will be working on a world changes/server-side pack soon.

All gallery images are taken on my SMP for my discord! (subtle nudge, if you wanna take part feel free to join the discord)

[My Vanilla Tweaks Config](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#F89FlC)

## Mod List:
<details>
<summary>Resource/Shader Packs</summary>

[Complementary Shaders Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) - EminGT (plus my config file!)
